!!STILL TAKING ANY REQUESTS!!

Sneak peek again..? ;)

You were finally a killer this round after waiting what felt like eternity in the lobby and as a survivor, you spawned into the map but something was different... You were a killer, yes. But why was Demon King alongside you?! He just stared at you with slight confusion and disbelief expression seeing that you were also a killer.

"What the hell. Why are YOU killer aswell??"
